title: diosma alpina
intro: Diosma alpina, also known as the Cape September-bos, is a small, shrub-like plant native to South Africa, belonging to the Rutaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oil. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and even acting as an antibacterial agent. Diosma alpina is often prepared as an essential oil, which can be used in aromatherapy or applied topically, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
